subcodes.first_line: Thine be the praise, O my God, for having chosen the righteous, selected the pure in heart, and singled out the free-spirited [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لک الحمد یا الهی بما اخترت الاخیار و اجتبیت الابرار و انتخبت الاحرار و
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @The Holy Spirit, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @service to others; to the Cause of God
